---
title: "LQAS Monitoring Dashboard"
output: 
  flexdashboard::flex_dashboard:
    orientation: columns
    vertical_layout: fill
    theme: flatly
    source_code: embed
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
library(flexdashboard)
library(data.table)
library(ggplot2)
library(DT)
library(dplyr)

# Load data
dt <- fread("../data/final/lqas_dashboard_input.csv")

# Calculate enhanced metrics
total_records <- nrow(dt)
pass_count <- sum(dt$status == "Pass", na.rm = TRUE)
fail_count <- sum(dt$status == "Fail", na.rm = TRUE)
pass_rate <- round(pass_count / total_records * 100, 1)

# Calculate coverage statistics
dt[, coverage := round(total_vaccinated / total_sampled * 100, 1)]
mean_coverage <- round(mean(dt$coverage, na.rm = TRUE), 1)
median_coverage <- round(median(dt$coverage, na.rm = TRUE), 1)
min_coverage <- min(dt$coverage, na.rm = TRUE)
max_coverage <- max(dt$coverage, na.rm = TRUE)

# Calculate missed children stats
total_missed <- sum(dt$total_missed, na.rm = TRUE)
avg_missed <- round(mean(dt$total_missed, na.rm = TRUE), 1)

# Get date range
if("start_date" %in% names(dt)) {
  dt[, survey_date := as.Date(start_date)]
  min_date <- min(dt$survey_date, na.rm = TRUE)
  max_date <- max(dt$survey_date, na.rm = TRUE)
} else {
  min_date <- max_date <- NA
}
